subject: English
source: Aruvi static lookup. Derived from NCF Languages CG (Section 2.4.1.1) and a 6-chapter mapping audit (V Ch 2, V Ch 6) showing 70% C-code overlap across chapters. The 6-spine itself carries NCF compliance — per-chapter mapping is redundant.

reading.label: Reading
reading.notes: Comprehension strategies and main ideas. Reading-interest codes (C-5.x) belong to the beyond_text spine.

listening.label: Listening
listening.notes: Summarises core ideas from material read out in class.

speaking.label: Speaking
speaking.notes: Conversation in different contexts and short oral presentations.

writing.label: Writing
writing.notes: Specific output type (paragraph / poster / story / dialogue) selects which subset of C-3.x codes is dominant for a given chapter.

vocabulary_grammar.label: Vocabulary and Grammar
vocabulary_grammar.notes: Word meanings, vocabulary discussions, and grammar use embedded in writing tasks.

beyond_text.label: Beyond the Text
beyond_text.notes: Library use, reading interest, project-style activities, riddles, hands-on extensions.
